violations.text: Milk and eggs were observed held at 47 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Product was disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The mop sink and walk-in were not in good repair. Mop sink to be repaired. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 11/24/2025
The mop sink and walk-in were not in good repair. Mop sink to be repaired. TCS foods must not be stored in walk-in until walk-in can hold 41 degrees or less Repeat Violation. Correct By: 12/04/2024

The dumpster outside is located on gravel. The outdoor storage surface for refuse, recyclables, and returnables must be constructed of nonabsorbent material such as concrete or asphalt and must be smooth, durable, and sloped to drain. New Violation. Correct By: 02/04/2025
The gasket of the deli cooler and walk-in cooler observed with torn gasket. PIC has maintenance service scheduled for repairs. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2023

Eggs, milk, and other items were observed held at 50-60 degrees Fahrenheit in the deli cooler that is maintaining an ambient of 50 degrees Fahrenheit and the walk-in cooler maintaining an ambient of 54 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2023

The following was observed in poor repair: 1) The display case cooler was observed maintaining an ambient of 51 degrees Fahrenheit 2) The walk-in cooler was observed maintaining an ambient of 54 degrees Fahrenheit 3) The gasket of the deli cooler and walk-in cooler observed with torn gasket - Refrigeration to not be used for any TCS items until units can be replaced/repaired/serviced. New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023
The following was observed not in good repair: 1) The 3-bay sink was lacking proper drain stoppers 2) The faucet does not reach all bays of the 3-bay sink New Violation. Correct By: 07/10/2023
